summary: Phase 5 Follow-Up Intelligence Features - All backend APIs pass 21/22 tests (1 skipped scheduler jobs endpoint). Frontend code review confirms all components correctly implemented. Browser crashes prevent full UI verification (known environment issue from iterations 42-47).

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes during Playwright automation after login - prevents UI screenshots/interaction testing
integration_issues.notes: Known environment issue from iterations 42-47. Login works correctly (redirects to /therapist). Browser target crashes when taking screenshots. Not a code issue.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: follow_ups.py GET /api/follow-ups/journey/{client_id} (lines 339-476) - Returns complete timeline with stats
VERIFIED: follow_ups.py GET /api/follow-ups/retention-analytics/detailed (lines 481-548) - Returns per-client metrics
VERIFIED: follow_ups.py GET/PUT /api/follow-ups/settings (lines 558-599) - Toggle followup_email_enabled and followup_whatsapp_enabled
VERIFIED: followup_reminders.py (services/scheduler/) - Job runs every 30 min, checks 2day/sameday/1week/30day reminders
VERIFIED: scheduler.py (line 112-120) - followup_reminders job registered with IntervalTrigger(minutes=30)
VERIFIED: templates.py (lines 1123-1237) - 4 email templates: followup_2day_reminder, followup_sameday_reminder, followup_1week_missed, followup_30day_reengagement
VERIFIED: ClientJourneyTimeline.js - Component with data-testid='client-journey-timeline', shows stats cards and timeline events
VERIFIED: ClientProfileView.js (line 555) - Journey tab added, imports ClientJourneyTimeline
VERIFIED: FollowUpDashboard.js (lines 324-364) - Per-client retention table with session_count, avg_gap_days, days_since_last_session
VERIFIED: Settings.js (lines 377-424) - Follow-Up Reminders section with email and WhatsApp toggles (data-testid='followup-email-toggle', 'followup-whatsapp-toggle')

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100% complete - UI testing blocked by browser crashes

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data from Phase 1-4 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Follow-Up Intelligence features fully implemented and verified via backend tests and code review. All 4 email templates registered, scheduler job running every 30 min. Browser automation crashes after login - known environment issue from iterations 42-47.

GET /api/follow-ups/journey/{client_id}.notes: Returns client_id, timeline (array of events), stats (total_sessions, total_recommendations, total_assessments, avg_gap_days, journey_duration_days)

GET /api/follow-ups/retention-analytics/.notes: Returns total_clients, clients_with_sessions, avg_sessions_per_client, avg_gap_between_sessions, client_details[]

PUT /api/follow-ups/settings.notes: Toggle email/WhatsApp reminders on/off, persists to therapist_settings collection

Email Templates.notes: 4 templates registered: followup_2day_reminder, followup_sameday_reminder, followup_1week_missed, followup_30day_reengagement

Scheduler Job.notes: followup_reminders job registered with 30-minute interval, check_followup_reminders function defined

ClientJourneyTimeline Component.notes: Stats cards (Sessions, Follow-Ups, Assessments, Avg Gap), visual timeline with color-coded events by type

ClientProfileView Journey Tab.notes: Journey tab added at line 555, ClientJourneyTimeline component rendered

FollowUpDashboard Per-Client Table.notes: Retention Analytics tab shows client_details table with session_count, avg_gap_days, days_since_last_session

Settings Follow-Up Reminders.notes: Section for therapists only, email toggle (data-testid='followup-email-toggle'), WhatsApp toggle (data-testid='followup-whatsapp-toggle')

browser_automation_results.dashboard_render: BLOCKED - Browser target crashes (known environment issue)

mocked_api.WhatsApp follow-up reminders: Template pending Twilio approval - logged intent only
